---
label: "Debugging"
icon: "\uD83D\uDC1B"
---

## AI-Assisted Debugging
  <ExpandableSection title="Effective Debugging Prompts" icon="🐛" defaultOpen>

How to get the best debugging help from AI:


      - **Include the full error:** Stack trace, error message, line numbers
      - **Show the code:** The function that{"'"}s failing + its callers
      - **Describe what you expected:** vs what actually happened
      - **Include what you{"'"}ve tried:** Prevents the AI from suggesting things you already ruled out

  </ExpandableSection>
  <CodeBlock b64="" />
  <Quiz question="When asking AI to debug code, what is the most important information to include?" options={["Your entire codebase","The full error message + relevant code + what you expected vs what happened","Just the error message","A description of what the code should do"]} correctIndex={1} explanation="The debugging trifecta: (1) the exact error with stack trace, (2) the relevant code (not the entire codebase), and (3) expected vs actual behavior. This gives the AI enough context to diagnose without noise. Bonus: mention what you've already tried."/>
